block.title: Initialize Library Module with Basic Functionality
block.objective: Create the basic library module structure with add_book functionality and JSON persistence capabilities
requirements: Create library.py file with basic Library class
Implement add_book method that preserves existing behavior
Create initial test file for library module
verification: Library class can be imported successfully
add_book method exists and works with basic parameters

last_review.summary: Block failed verification. The pytest command is not available in the environment, preventing test execution. Additionally, the implementation does not fully satisfy all requirements - it's missing the 'preserve existing add_book behavior' requirement and lacks proper handling of the read status in the save/load methods.

requirements.requirement: Create library.py file with basic Library class
requirements.evidence: library.py contains the Library class with Book class and all required methods

requirements.requirement: Implement add_book method that preserves existing behavior
requirements.evidence: The add_book method does not preserve existing behavior as it doesn't handle the case where a book is already in the library properly. The implementation raises ValueError for duplicates but doesn't maintain backward compatibility with any existing behavior.
save_to_json and load_from_json methods are implemented in library.py

requirements.requirement: Create initial test file for library module
requirements.evidence: test_library.py exists with comprehensive tests for all library functionality

requirements.requirement: Library class can be imported successfully
requirements.evidence: pytest is not available in the environment to run the tests

requirements.requirement: add_book method exists and works with basic parameters
requirements.evidence: pytest is not available in the environment to run the tests
save_to_json and load_from_json methods are implemented in library.py
pytest is not available in the environment to run the tests

required_fixes: The add_book method should preserve existing behavior as required. The current implementation raises ValueError for duplicates but doesn't maintain backward compatibility.
The save_to_json and load_from_json methods need to properly handle the read status of books in the JSON serialization.
